summary: Complete testing of SAMSON Church Management System user journey: Register > Login > Donate > View History. All 22 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend flows working correctly - SignUp, Login, Portal navigation, Give page with Stripe checkout all functional.

details: Registration with valid credentials creates user and auto-logs in
Password requirements shown with live validation
Portal Home shows welcome message with user name
Quick actions: Give Now, My Groups, Upcoming Events
Navigation: Home, Watch, Give, Groups, Events, Me
Donation form with amount input, quick amounts ($25, $50, $100, $250)
Frequency selection (One time, Weekly, Monthly, etc.)
Payment method selection (Card/ACH, PayPal, Venmo, Zelle)
YTD giving displayed ($599,357 for demo member)
Giving history table shows past donations

bug_fix_applied.issue: HTTPException swallowed by generic Exception handler in /api/payments/donate
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added explicit HTTPException handler before generic Exception
bug_fix_applied.impact: Donation validation errors now return proper 400 status instead of 500

frontend_fix_applied.issue: App stuck on initialization screen if seed API fails
frontend_fix_applied.fix: Simplified seeding logic to use single isReady state and proceed on failure
frontend_fix_applied.impact: App now loads even if seed API is unreachable

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard stats API is MOCKED - returns hardcoded demo values
Welcome email uses Resend in test mode - only sends to verified addresses
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed HTTPException handling in donate endpoint
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete user journey tested: Registration creates user with welcome email, Login routes member to /portal and admin to /dashboard, Give page loads donation form with Stripe integration, Stripe checkout session created successfully and redirects to live Stripe. All APIs working. Dashboard stats are MOCKED. Stripe keys are LIVE (pk_live_, rk_live_).

mocked_apis_list: /api/dashboard/stats - Returns hardcoded demo values (487 members, $24,750 MTD)
